title: Compact Armors
body:
# Compact Armors
**It's important that you have [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or the [[EMF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) mod to be able to see the armor model.**

This is my resource pack and it modifies the game's base armor to make it much more compact or tight for the player.

You can even use other resource packs that change the texture of the game's base armor.

![Difference in the armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c775082a2321bc19e8c9041707ac386d67a372e.png)

The slim skins will have smaller shoulders on their armor and will only use 3 pixels of the texture instead of 4.
![Difference in the slim armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f1134ce826ec5c1ab5716d86515c26bc1e77db0.png)
